hero.title: AI Architecture
hero.subtitle: Design · Deploy · Scale
hero.description: The reference platform for AI architecture: intelligent system design, autonomous agent deployment, automation and integration. Switzerland, Europe, Canada, USA.

hero.subtitle: Upload any document. Build a digital twin of public opinion. Run synchronized simulations across social media and prediction markets in minutes.

bento.title: Built for teams who need
bento.subtitle_optional: A state-of-the-art stack designed for demanding decision-makers.
bento.graph_desc: Neo4j automatically extracts entities and relationships from your document. Smart NER filters and parallelized batch writes.
bento.agents_desc: Personas grounded in the graph: attributes, relations, semantic search, web research.
bento.market_desc: Synthetic Polymarket with non-50/50 LLM-generated starting price.
bento.report_desc: ReACT agent citing what agents actually said and how markets moved. Sourced data, verifiable numbers.
bento.chat_desc: Talk with any agent or group. Full conversation history.
bento.i18n_desc: EN, FR, DE, IT. Deploy anywhere.

workflow.title: From upload to report in 5 steps.
workflow.subtitle: Fully automated pipeline. No manual intervention required.
workflow.upload_desc: PDF, DOCX or plain text. Up to 20MB. Press releases, policy drafts, financial reports.
workflow.graph_desc: Automatic entity and relationship extraction. Neo4j storage.
workflow.agents_desc: Hundreds of agents with personas grounded in the graph.
workflow.simulate_desc: Twitter, Reddit and Polymarket run in parallel via asyncio.
workflow.report_desc: ReACT agent compiles posts, prices and belief trajectories.

showcase.title: Safer decisions,
showcase.subtitle: From corporate comms to finance, test the impact of your statements before they go public.
showcase.media_desc: Test how a product will be received before launch. Anticipate controversy, optimize messaging.
showcase.finance_desc: Simulate reactions from investors, analysts and traders on a quarterly earnings report.
showcase.policy_desc: Assess objections and public acceptance of new policy before consultation.
showcase.product_desc: Check how a campaign will be perceived by 500 target personas across 3 platforms.

cta.subtitle: Launch your first test in under 5 minutes. Free plan available.

results.title: Results that
results.subtitle: Validated against expert panels and historical cases.
results.chart_methodology: Methodology: 1200 simulated cases vs panel of senior analysts. Compared against ground truth (post-launch reception, market reactions).

testimonials.title: What strategy leaders
testimonials.subtitle: Direct feedback from analysts, consultants and corporate decision-makers.
testimonials.t1_quote: AI-DUE compresses weeks of qualitative research into minutes. The agent diversity gives us viewpoint coverage no focus group can match.
testimonials.t2_quote: We tested it on a regulatory draft before going public. It surfaced two stakeholder objections we had completely missed. Saved us a public consultation cycle.
testimonials.t2_role: Head of Public Affairs, listed group
testimonials.t3_quote: Our IR team uses it before every earnings release. The trader-agent reactions are uncannily close to what we see post-publication.
testimonials.t4_quote: A serious tool. The methodology is transparent, the reports are sourced. Far above the average GenAI marketing.

simulator.subtitle: Upload a document. Our engine generates agents, runs the simulation and compiles the report automatically.
simulator.upload_hint: Click to upload or drag and drop
simulator.prompt_placeholder: e.g. what impact will this press release have on investors?
simulator.upgrade_note: Free plan: 1 simulation per week. Upgrade for more.
simulator.queued_desc: Your document is being processed. You will be notified by email. To run more simulations, upgrade to a higher plan.

pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need to. Cancel anytime.
pricing.footer_note: All prices in EUR. Monthly billing. Cancel anytime.
pricing.enterprise_desc: For teams and agencies with custom needs.

checkout.title: Finalize your subscription
checkout.subtitle: Secure payment via Stripe. Cancel anytime.

seo.home_title: AI-DUE — Public opinion simulation engine | AI Swarm
seo.home_description: Stress-test the future before it happens. Multi-agent simulation engine: upload a document, generate hundreds of AI agents, simulate reactions on social media and prediction markets.
